text.message: was looking for double block spot
So you just ask to see if I have
And rob me when I have it
nah i asked cause i wanted to do the trade
then i had 10 seconds for the robber placement
was looking for a spot to block green and red
5 robs for being the first settle
You’re saying that like I’m getting road
Tell me what’s my win condition
well you have ton of space its not impossible you get road to be honest
guys guys can we all just chill
And robbed me when green was the clear rob
Someone take road before green double plays
